_comment: Panel type registry. To add a community panel type: place a JS module in server/static/, add an entry here. The module must export init(el, config), destroy(), onBridgeUpdate(state).

chat.label: Chat
chat.description: Independent conversation with its own history and model assignment.

vault.label: Vault Notes
vault.description: ChromaDB semantic search over the vault. Updates automatically based on main feed topic.

pipeline.label: Pipeline
pipeline.description: Read-only real-time view of Gear 4 pipeline stage execution.

clarification.label: Clarification
clarification.description: Ephemeral chat for questions that should not enter the main conversation. Send to Main injects context.
